vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The finding requires editing the Chrony configuration file to ensure only server directives are used and restarting the chronyd service. This is a straightforward, low‑impact change that does not affect authentication, bootloader, or critical system services.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; filesystems affected; potential loss of time synchronization if misconfigured; temporary service interruption during chronyd restart

previous_attempts.scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for chronyd_server_directive (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_chronyd_server_directive). Could not verify.
